creator: philippe.michel7@free.fr
text:
I recently rebuild my system at commit 4ad93073a17d579625217084b7831e5419c7758f and the hang at kldload doesn't happen any more.

I did this enticed by the comment from the slighty earlier 1e010401b80196ac5904ad4e8b8b9589e61394b4 : "Fixes startup lockup of i915kms after update to drm-kmod v5.12".

Although the port is drm 5.10 and it is not clear if the comment means a fix to the just preceding, linuxkpi-related, commit or to a more general issue, this seemed like it may be possibly relevant.

I did not try to verify if that was it that made a difference, though.
